keyFindings: T3 Episodic Log and T5 Shared State must be built in P1 — every agent action without audit logging is permanently unauditable. Retroactive audit is the most expensive data architecture mistake.
Embedding model dimension (768 vs 1536) is locked at table creation. This is the single highest-risk decision to defer — changing it requires full re-embedding of the entire knowledge base.

Anthropic DPA verification is a P1 urgent action — data residency for Claude API calls is currently unverified. If data routes offshore, current production platform may have a Privacy Act APP 11 exposure today.
Adding tenant_id to all Postgres tables in P1 (even as a single-tenant default) costs 30 minutes now vs a painful migration when P2 clients are live. This must be done before any schema is finalised.
P3 (licensed product) vs direct P2→P4 jump is an unresolved strategic question — the answer materially changes where architectural investment is directed in 2026-2027.
p1ImmediateActions: Deploy Postgres + episodic log schema (agent_events, agent_decisions, decision_lineage, memory_access_log) with SHA-256 hashing wired to first 3 active agents — Weeks 1-2
Verify Anthropic DPA for Australian data processing location — establish Data Residency Register mapping each model/API to permitted data categories — Weeks 1-2
Add tenant_id to all Postgres tables (DEFAULT 'ainchors') before schema is finalised — prevents expensive P2 migration — Weeks 2-3
Lock embedding model (nomic-embed-text, 768-dim), deploy pgvector extension, create knowledge_chunks and knowledge_documents tables — Weeks 3-4
Implement PII scanner (spaCy or Presidio) in document ingestion pipeline — block embedding of PII-positive documents without explicit approval — Weeks 3-4
decisionsForKen: Q1: After verifying Anthropic DPA — which data categories are acceptable on Claude API vs Gemma4-only?
Q2: Postgres deployment on OC1 — standalone Homebrew or Docker?
Q3: Redis in P1 — add now for P2-readiness, or defer to P2 and use Postgres session tables only?
Q4: Initial knowledge base priority — which documents to ingest first in Month 2?
Q5: PII scanner tool selection — spaCy (lighter) or Presidio (enterprise-grade)?
Q6: Formal audit log retention policy for P1 — set a policy now (recommended: indefinite) or defer?
Q7: agent_shared_state conflict handling — automatic retry on optimistic lock conflict, or last-write-wins with history preserved?
Q8: P2 multi-tenancy model — schema-per-tenant (recommended for early P2) or shared schema + RLS from day one?
Q9: Is P3 (licensed product) a planned phase or does AInchors go P2 SaaS → P4 enterprise consulting directly?
Q10: Portfolio artefacts primary audience — Ken's job search (CIO/CTO credential) or AInchors client-facing sales collateral?
